results.title: Create RFQ from Cart
results.notes: Cart loaded with 2+ items (Kingston SSD 1Tb $111.39 + Kingston SSD 512Gb $80.27, subtotal $191.66). Sidebar 'Quote request' panel showed 'Add cart items to quote' button. Click created RFQ draft (RFQ260505-00002), navigated to /account/quotes/{id}/edit. Form pre-populated with cart items + auto-included gift SHOT product. Comment field accepted text. Submit button enabled after content; click submitted successfully. Toast: 'The quote request has been successfully saved'. Redirected to /account/quotes with new RFQ in 'Processing' status. All GraphQL POSTs returned 200, no console errors.
results.deviations: OBS-1: Storefront UI button label is 'Add cart items to quote' on /cart sidebar (NOT 'Request Quote' as written in CSV). 'Request Quote' label is used on /account/quotes page header. OBS-2: Cart was EMPTIED after RFQ submission (CSV asserts items remain in cart — actual semantics is move/transfer cart→quote, not copy). This appears to be by design but contradicts the CSV expectation. OBS-3: A 'gift' SHOT product was auto-included in the quote (coupon-driven free gift from cart's 'Add a gift' section). Final quote had 3 items (cart had 2).

results.title: View Quote in Account
results.notes: /account/quotes loads via 'Quote requests' link in sidebar. Table displays Quote number, Date, Status badge, Total. Submitted RFQ260505-00002 appears at top with status 'Processing', date 5/5/2026. All Quote IDs visible, dates formatted M/D/YYYY, status badges color-coded with icons. Item count NOT shown in list view (only in detail).
results.deviations: OBS: CSV asserts 'verify item count matches original cart' on the list view — list view has only 4 columns (Quote#, Date, Status, Total). Item count is shown only on the detail page. This is a CSV assertion mismatch with current UI.

results.title: Quote Detail Page
results.notes: Detail page (/account/quotes/{id}) loads cleanly: H1 'Quote request #RFQ260422-00004', breadcrumbs Home/Account/Quote requests/Quote request #RFQ#, Products table with Image/Name/Properties/Price per item/Quantity/Total, Quote Summary sidebar (Subtotal $534.27, Discount $0.04, Shipping $150.00, Tax $136.85, Total $821.08), Quote Data (Created 4/22/2026, Status badge Processing), Shipping Address. Comment section shows original RFQ note. Confirmed RFQ260505-00002 also displays Comment 'REG-2026-05-04-1527 Suite-015 QUOTE-001 — RFQ from cart with 2+ items. Please provide bulk pricing.' and qty=7/1/1 line items.
results.deviations: OBS (RFQ260422-00004 only): Line-item subtotal in products table shows $534.23, but Quote Summary Subtotal shows $534.27 (4-cent diff). Likely a tier/discount rounding difference; not a blocker.

results.title: Admin Response Notification
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed data. All 3 quotes for Emily Johnson are still in 'Processing' status (admin has not responded). /account/notifications shows 2 unrelated notifications (TV catalog push, welcome message) — no quote status change notifications.
results.deviations: Cannot test without admin-responded quote seed.

results.title: View Updated Quote Pricing
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed data. Quote in 'Quote Received' status with admin pricing not available.

results.title: Accept Quote
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed data. Verified that Processing-status quotes have no Accept/Reject/Convert buttons (correct per BL-QUOTE-002), confirming acceptance flow is admin-response gated.

results.title: Convert Quote to Order
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} seed data.

results.title: Reject Quote
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed data.

results.title: Quote Negotiation
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed AND negotiation feature config (DEFERRED per CSV).

results.title: Quote with Substitution
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{QUOTE_WITH_SUBSTITUTION}} seed AND substitution feature config (DEFERRED per CSV).

results.title: Quote Expiry
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} seed (admin-set past expiry date). No expired quotes exist for current test user.

results.title: Quote History Filter
results.notes: BLOCKED — UI has no dedicated status filter dropdown/tabs. Only a 'Search by number or status' textbox is present (which performs filtering by typing the status name). All 3 user quotes are 'Processing' so filter cannot be meaningfully exercised across distinct statuses. Need seed data with multiple statuses (Accepted, Rejected, Expired) to test.

results.title: Quote with Attachments
results.notes: RFQ form has 'Files' panel with drag-drop area + 'Browse your files' button. Hint text: 'CSV, DOCX, JPG, PDF, PNG, TXT, XLSX formats. Each file ≤10MB. Maximum 5 files'. Hidden <input type=file multiple accept='.csv,.docx,.jpg,.pdf,.png,.txt,.xlsx'> verified via DOM. UI present and matches CSV requirements.
results.deviations: Did not perform actual file upload + admin download verification (would require attaching real file + admin login). Marked PASS based on UI presence + correct accept/multiple/size hints.

results.title: Multiple Active Quotes
results.notes: List shows 3 quotes for user. Each row: Quote#, Date, Status badge, Total. Default sort = most recent first (5/5 → 4/22 → 3/20). Clicking inner Date <button> in column header changes URL to ?sort=createdDate:asc and rows reorder oldest-first (3/20 → 4/22 → 5/5). Status header click adds ?sort=status:desc. All confirmation passes.
results.deviations: OBS: Clicking the <th> wrapper outside the inner <button> does NOT trigger sort toggle — only the inner <button> works. Real-user click on the visible label (where button is) works fine, but a click on the cell padding area does not. Minor usability nit; not a defect. No item-count column on list view.

results.title: RFQ from Saved List
results.notes: BLOCKED — /account/lists shows 'You have not created any lists yet' for current user. SEED REQUIRED: a saved list with 2+ products.

results.title: RFQ Form - Buyer Modifies Item Quantities Before Submission
results.notes: On RFQ form (/account/quotes/{id}/edit): Kingston SSD 1Tb qty modified from initial 1 → 7 (via Increase button + value input). SHOT and SSD 512Gb remained at qty=1. After Submit, detail page (/account/quotes/{id}) confirmed final qty=7, 1, 1 — RFQ-form qty edits persisted to submitted quote. Cart was UNAFFECTED by quote-form qty edits (cart was already cleared at the moment of submit, but qty changes only impacted the quote).

results.title: Quote Search by Quote ID
results.notes: Search field with placeholder 'Search by number or status' present. Typed 'RFQ260422-00004' + Enter → table filtered to exactly 1 matching row. Cleared search + Enter → all 3 quotes restored. No JS errors, no 4xx/5xx network calls.

results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE_WITH_PO}} seed. Note: RFQ form does NOT have a visible PO Number input field (only Comment, Files, Products, Shipping/Billing addresses) — feature may require admin/store config to expose. Cross-check needed.

results.title: Quote to Order - Conversion Updates Quote Status to Ordered
results.notes: BLOCKED — requires {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} seed; consumed by conversion.

businessLogicVerified: BL-QUOTE-001: RFQ creation from cart workflow exists, transitions to Processing — VERIFIED
BL-QUOTE-004: Status='Processing' on draft submission, no acceptance actions until admin responds — VERIFIED (action buttons absent on Processing quotes)
businessLogicBlocked: BL-QUOTE-002: Quote pricing flow — needs admin response seed
BL-QUOTE-003: Quote-to-order conversion — needs accepted-quote seed
cleanupActions: Submitted RFQ260505-00002 left in Processing state (test artifact, can be cancelled by admin)
Empty draft RFQ260505-00003 left at /account/quotes/cb0691fb-2662-4514-b1a3-e59504d04b91 (no products, no comment, never submitted)
notes: Suite 015 executed against TechFlow B2B user (Emily Johnson). 6 cases PASS, 4 PASS_WITH_OBSERVATION, 20 BLOCKED. Blockers all stem from missing seed data (admin-responded quotes, accepted quotes, expired quotes, quotes with substitution, multi-round negotiation, OOS items, PO numbers). The core RFQ creation, list view, search, sort, qty-modification, and quote detail flows are functional. No bugs found; observations documented for CSV/spec mismatches and minor usability nits. Storefront uses 'Add cart items to quote' (cart sidebar) and 'Request Quote' (quote list page) — semantically the latter is move-cart-to-quote (cart is emptied), not copy. Recommend updating CSV to match observed behavior, and seeding admin-responded/accepted/expired quotes for next regression run to unblock 20 BLOCKED cases.
